*** 2 INJ *** EF-2. THIS TORNADO FORMED SOUTHWEST OF TAOPI AND QUICKLY INTENSIFIED CAUSING SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE TO THE SMALL TOWN. MOST BUILDINGS WERE DAMAGED AND SEVERAL WERE DESTROYED. SEVERAL CARS WERE ALSO TOSSED. A TOTAL OF 2 INJURIES WERE REPORTED AND SEVERAL FAMILIES HAD TO BE RESCUED FROM THE RUBBLE. 7.3 MILE PATH LENGTH.
